title: He Became MILLIONAIRE with THIS Powerful Indicator!
thesis_bullets: Bill Williams was a famous American trader who has author of many books about trading and also creator of some popular indicators that are used by traders in all financial markets.
Today we're gonna talk about Alligator which is one of the famous indicators created by Bill Williams.
I will teach you what this indicator is and how you can use it in trading and then I will teach you a trading strategy based on Alligator which is very accurate and profitable.
All right on trading view platform here we click on indicators and we search Alligator.
This one Williams Alligator which is a belt and indicator on trading view platform.
All right this is the indicator and as you can see it is overlaid on the price chart.
We have three lines here in this indicator.
The green line is called the alligator lips.
The red line is called the alligator's teeth and the blue line is called the alligator's jaw.
If we go to the settings of the indicator you can see that for the jaw the length of the moving average 13.

hypotheses.statement: BTC continuation edge appears when signal alignment persists on 1h.
hypotheses.rationale: Research and indicator mentions converge on trend-continuation logic with confirmation filters.
hypotheses.falsifiable_test: Backtest BTC on 1h: require >=55% win rate and positive expectancy over 200+ trades; reject if unmet.

strategy_heuristics_used: Every hypothesis should include explicit regime assumptions and invalidate conditions.
Separate signal logic from execution logic to reduce confounded performance attribution.
Require risk gating concepts before scaling complexity in entry or exit rules.
automation_heuristics_used: Keep human approval checkpoints for high-impact automation and deployment transitions.
Enforce deterministic session gating before any live-capable execution pathway is enabled.
Invest first in telemetry for risk, latency, and execution drift before adding new automation features.
